vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to different materials (CFRP, Al, TPU)
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate material compatibility

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient load transfer through wing spar socket
risk.mit: Perform finite element analysis to ensure structural integrity

risk.desc: Camera window may be prone to damage during handling
risk.mit: Implement protective cover or reinforcement around camera window

risk.desc: GPS boom mount might interfere with other components
risk.mit: Review layout and adjust positioning if necessary

risk.desc: Service access may be limited due to tight space constraints
risk.mit: Optimize design for better accessibility during maintenance

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Structural spine and avionics bay for fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles

physics_paths.path_description: Loads from wing spars transferred into fuselage spine via spar sockets.
Heat dissipation from avionics bay through fuselage shell.
Electrical and data signals from avionics bay routed through harness pass-throughs.

integration_opportunities: Add additional sensor pockets for future avionics upgrades.
Incorporate modular harness pass-throughs for easy reconfiguration.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: ±0.1mm for critical interfaces, ±0.2mm for non-critical features
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures designed for optimal orientation during FDM printing
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for surface finish and dimensional accuracy, ultrasonic testing for internal voids

verification_focus: Mass estimation: Ensure total mass is within budget constraints.
Load path analysis: Validate structural integrity under expected loads.
Service access: Confirm ease of maintenance and component replacement.

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to heat generation from the motor.
risk.mit: Implement a robust heat sink design and ensure proper airflow.

risk.desc: Complexity in assembly due to multiple interfaces and features.
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly instructions and conduct pilot builds.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during servo linkage installation.
risk.mit: Include precise alignment guides and perform pre-installation checks.

risk.desc: Potential structural failure if bearing seats are not properly designed.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough load testing and validate bearing seat integrity.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance for nacelle rotation.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance arc dimensions to ensure adequate rotation.

physics_paths.description: Thrust from rotor is transferred through the tilt axis and bearing seat to the wing spar.
Servo drives the tilt axis via a worm gear and linkage.
Heat generated by the motor is dissipated through the heat sink and motor pocket.
